$comment: Engine manifest (SPEC 5.4: readers provide engines, files never do; readers MUST verify engine integrity before use). This file is the pinned identity of the ONE Pyodide build every POID reader in this repo runs: exact version, download source, and the sha256 of every file the loader will execute. scripts/fetch-pyodide.mjs downloads and verifies against these pins (--write records them); packages/poid-host verifies again at load time. The shape of this file is the working draft for the SPEC engines chapter.
name: pyodide
